title: 360° Glass 2-in-1 Hepa Filter & Activated Carbon Filter for Dyson DP04 HP04 HP06 HP07 HP09 PH01 PH02 PH03 TP04 TP06 TP07 TP09 Air Purifiers (360 True H13 HEPA + Activated Carbon)
features: 【PERFECT FIT】: 360° glass HEPA & Carbon filter replacement - Compatible with Dyson PH04 PH03 PH02 PH01 TP10 HP10 HP09 TP09 HP07 TP07 HP06 TP06 Models for Dyson Pure Cool, Pure Hot Cool Cryptomic and Humidify Cool Air Puri-fiers

【PLEASE NOTICE】: This TP10 filter is NOT compatible with TP03, TP02, TP01, AM11, BP01, HP02, HP01, DP02, DP01.DP04. Please double-check your model on the bottom or side of the machine before placing your order

【NEW 2-IN-1 FILTER】: This 360° combi glass filter for the Pure Cool Hot Humidify fan combines HEPA and carbon filters into a single piece, making installation and maintenance even more convenient. (Replacement Part #970341-01)

【PREMIUM HEPA FILTER】: True HEPA filter attaching 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns, and cleans pet dander, pollen, and dust. The activated carbon filter efficiently absorbs household odors from smoking, pets, and cooking fumes

【SUPERIOR QUALITY】: Our PH04 PH03 PH02 PH01 HP09 TP09 HP07 TP07 HP06 TP06 HEPA filter replacements for Dyson are made using premium H13 True HEPA materials. The carbon component in our product is made from FSC-certified charcoal powder

【NOTICE】: When installing the filter, disconnect the power first and place the strap facing upward at the top. After replacing the filter, it's essential to reset it, or the machine won't recognize the new one. Before installing the 2-in-1 filter, if your home was previously equipped with a filter composed of a filter mesh and activated carbon, you'll need to remove both parts before the filter can be installed properly
description: From the brand JUYLTOOL It Cleans Deeper. It Lasts Longer. That's The Difference. Previous page Mop pads&Hepa fliter Next page
